Adjust an option by an amount relative t: Daidaici zaɓi ne gwargwadon darajar da yake yanzu. (Hakanan yana nuna sabuwar darajar, wadda za a iya takaita ta zuwa wasu iyaka.)
Adjusts the center position of horizonta: Yana gyara matsakaicin matsayi na lanƙwasawar kai a kwance. Ba a ba da shawarar hakan ba; idan zai yiwu ka matsar da kyamara maimakon haka.
Yana gyara matsakaicin matsayi na lanƙwasawar kai a kwance. Wannan karkacewar a kwance ba a ba da shawarar ta ba; idan zai yiwu ka matsar da kyamara maimakon haka.
Adjusts the center position of vertical: Yana gyara matsakaicin matsayi na lanƙwasawar kai a tsaye.
Adjusts the position of the cursor when: Yana gyara matsayin sigifa lokacin da kyamara ta ga kai na kallon gaba kai tsaye.

An error occurred while updating from gi: An sami kuskure yayin sabuntawa daga git.
Automatically starts Tracky Mouse as soo: Yana kunna Tracky Mouse da kansa da zarar an fara shirin.
Blends between using point tracking (2D):
Yana haɗa tsakanin amfani da bin diddigin maki (2D) da kuma gano lanƙwasawar kai (3D).
- A 0% zai yi amfani da bin diddigin maki kaɗai. Wannan yana motsa sigifa ne gwargwadon motsin maki na 2D a fuska a cikin hangen kyamara, don haka yana amsawa ga juyawar kai da motsawa gaba da baya.
- A 100% zai yi amfani da lanƙwasawar kai kaɗai. Yana amfani da kimanta inda fuska take a sararin 3D, yana watsi da motsawar kai gaba da baya. Ana santsi da wannan, don haka ba ya da saurin amsa kamar bin diddigin maki. A wannan yanayin ba lallai ne ka sake tsakiya ta hanyar tura sigifa zuwa gefen allo ba.
- Tsakanin haka zai yi kama da daidaitawa ta atomatik, yana gyara bin diddigin maki a hankali domin ya dace da lanƙwasawar kai. Wannan yana rage saurin motsawar sigifa da ke kaucewa wurin da ake tsammani bisa lanƙwasawar kai, kuma (sama da 80% a kan zamewa) yana motsawa a hankali zuwa wurin.
Canza wani zaɓi zuwa takamaiman daraja. (Hakanan yana nuna sabuwar darajar, wadda za a iya takaita ta zuwa wasu iyaka.)
Changes the language Tracky Mouse is dis: Yana canza harshen da Tracky Mouse ke bayyana da shi.

Close one eye to click. Left eye for lef: Rufe ido ɗaya don danna. Idon hagu don danna hagu, idon dama don danna dama.

Kashe kwamfutarka da kyamarar yanar gizo.
Control your mouse hands-free. This CLI: Yi amfani da linzamin kwamfuta ba tare da amfani da hannu ba. Wannan CLI yana sarrafa manhajar Tracky Mouse da ke gudana. An yi shi ne domin wasu shirye-shirye na waje kamar tsarin umarnin murya domin kunna/kashe Tracky Mouse da daidaita saituna cikin gaggawa.
Controls how much you need to tilt your: Yana sarrafa yawan lanƙwasawar kai zuwa hagu ko dama da ake buƙata don isa gefen allo.
Yana sarrafa yawan lanƙwasawar kai sama ko ƙasa da ake buƙata don isa gefen allo.
Couldn't checkout the latest version in: Ba a iya zazzage sabon sigar a ma'ajiyar git ta gida ba. Wataƙila kana da canje-canjen da ba a adana su ba.
Ba a iya samo sabuntawa daga git ba.
Determines whether cursor movement is ba: Yana tantance ko motsin sigifa ya dogara ne da lanƙwasawar kai a 3D, ko kuma motsin fuska na 2D a cikin hoton kyamara.
Disable clicking. Use with an external s: Kashe danna. Yi amfani da shi tare da maɓallin waje ko shirye-shiryen da ke da nasu danna na tsayawa (dwell).
Failed to backup current settings before: An kasa ajiye madadin saitunan da ake amfani da su kafin shigo da sabbi.
Failed to install dependencies for the n: An kasa shigar da abubuwan da sabon sigar ke buƙata bayan zazzagewa daga git.
Failed to parse known cameras from local: An kasa warware bayanan kyamarori daga localStorage:
An kasa karanta fayil ɗin da aka zaɓa.
Higher acceleration makes the cursor mov: Hanzari mai yawa yana sa sigifa ta yi saurin motsi idan kai ya motsa da sauri, ta yi nisa ɗan hankali idan motsin kai ya yi sannu a hankali.
Hold the cursor in place for a short tim: Riƙe sigifa a wuri na ɗan lokaci domin danna.
How much you need to tilt your head left: Yawan lanƙwasawar kai zuwa hagu da dama da ake buƙata don isa gefen allo.
Yawan lanƙwasawar kai zuwa hagu ko dama da ake buƙata don isa gefen allo.
How much you need to tilt your head up a: Yawan lanƙwasawar kai sama da ƙasa da ake buƙata don isa gefen allo.
How much you need to tilt your head up o: Yawan lanƙwasawar kai sama ko ƙasa da ake buƙata don isa gefen allo.
If enabled, Tracky Mouse will automatica: Idan an kunna wannan, Tracky Mouse zai duba sabuntawa da kansa lokacin da aka kunna shi.
Idan an kunna wannan, Tracky Mouse zai fara aiki da kansa lokacin da ka shiga kwamfutarka.
If enabled, Tracky Mouse will start cont: Idan an kunna wannan, Tracky Mouse zai fara sarrafa sigifa da zarar an kunna shi.
If enabled, you can start or stop mouse: Idan an kunna wannan, zaka iya fara ko dakatar da sarrafa linzamin kwamfuta ta rufe idanuwanka biyu na ƴan daƙiƙu.
Locks mouse movement during the start of: Yana kulle motsin linzamin kwamfuta a farkon danna domin kauce wa ja ba da gangan ba.
Locks mouse movement for the given durat:
Yana kulle motsin linzamin kwamfuta na wani ɗan lokaci a farkon danna.
Za ka iya kashe wannan idan kana zanen abu a kan allon zane, ko ƙara lokacin idan kana jin kana ja ba tare da niyya ba yayin danna.
Makes the cursor move extra fast for qui: Yana sa sigifa ta yi gaggawar motsi idan kai ya yi saurin motsi, kuma ta yi motsi a hankali idan motsin kai ya yi sannu a hankali. Wannan yana taimaka mata ta zauna mai kwanciyar hankali.
Makes the cursor move relatively fast fo:
Yana sa sigifa ta yi motsi cikin sauri idan motsin kai ya yi sauri, kuma ta rage sauri idan motsin ya yi sannu a hankali.
Yana taimaka wa sigifa ta kasance da kwanciyar hankali. Duk da haka, idan ana amfani da bin diddigin maki tare da lanƙwasawar kai, ƙaramar daraja na iya aiki mafi kyau saboda lanƙwasawar kai na tafiya a layi, kuma kana so bin diddigin maki ya kusan dacewa da bin diddigin kai domin daidaitawa ta kai tsaye.
Makes Tracky Mouse active as soon as it': Yana sa Tracky Mouse ya kasance a kunne da zarar an kunna shi.
Yana sa Tracky Mouse ya fara aiki da zarar an kunna shi. Idan ba haka ba, za ka iya kunna shi da kanka idan ka shirya.
Makes Tracky Mouse start automatically w: Yana sa Tracky Mouse ya fara aiki da kansa lokacin da ka shiga kwamfutarka.
Minimum distance to move the cursor in o: Ƙaramin tazara da sigifa za ta iya motsawa a kowane hoto (frame), a ma'aunin pixel. Yana taimakawa wajen tsayar da sigifa gaba ɗaya.
Yana nuna hoton kyamara a madubi a kwance.
Movement less than this distance in pixe: Za a yi watsi da motsin da ya gaza wannan tazarar a pixel.
No camera found. Please make sure you ha: Ba a sami kyamara ba. Don Allah ka tabbata an haɗa kyamara kuma an kunna ta.
Notifies you of new versions of Tracky M: Yana sanar da kai sabbin sigogin Tracky Mouse.
Notifies you when a new version of Track: Yana sanar da kai idan sabon sigar Tracky Mouse ya fito.
Open mouth to click (ignoring eyes): Buɗe baki ka danna (ba tare da la'akari da idanu ba)
Open mouth to click (with eye modifiers): Buɗe baki ka danna (tare da amfani da idanu)
Open your camera's system settings windo: Buɗe taga saitunan tsarin kyamararka don daidaita haske, bambanci da sauransu.
Open your mouth wide to click. At least: Buɗe bakinka sosai domin ka danna. Aƙalla ido ɗaya dole ne ya buɗe kafin a danna.
Open your mouth wide to click. Eye state: Buɗe bakinka sosai domin ka danna. Ba a la'akari da yanayin idanu.
Open your mouth wide to click. If left e: Buɗe bakinka sosai domin ka danna. Idan idon hagu ya rufe, danna dama ne; idan idon dama ya rufe, danna tsakiya ne.
Opens the system settings dialog for the: Yana buɗe taga saitunan tsarin kyamara da aka zaɓa domin daidaita abubuwa kamar auto-focus da auto-exposure.
Opens the system settings window for you: Yana buɗe taga saitunan tsarin kyamararka domin daidaita abubuwa kamar auto-focus da auto-exposure.
Yana nuna darajar da ake da ita na wani zaɓi.
Permission denied. Please enable access: An ƙi izini. Don Allah ka kunna damar amfani da kyamara.
Please make sure no other programs are u: Ka tabbata babu wani shiri da ke amfani da kyamara sannan ka sake gwadawa.
Latsa %0 don kunnawa ko kashe Tracky Mouse.
Range of horizontal head tilt that moves: Matsayin lanƙwasawar kai a kwance da ke motsa sigifa daga gefe ɗaya na allo zuwa ɗaya.
Range of vertical head tilt required to: Matsayin lanƙwasawar kai a tsaye da ake buƙata don motsa sigifa daga sama zuwa ƙasa na allo.
Select the language for the Tracky Mouse: Zaɓi harshen da ake so don fuskar Tracky Mouse.
Select which camera to use for head trac: Zaɓi wacce kyamara za a yi amfani da ita don bin diddigin kai.
Selects which camera is used for head tr: Yana zaɓar wacce kyamara ake amfani da ita don bin diddigin kai.
Since this is a git repository, the upda: Domin wannan ma'ajiyar git ce, ana iya ɗaukar sabuntawa kai tsaye.
Something went wrong accessing the camer: Wani abu ya lalace wajen samun dama ga kyamara.
Wani abu ya lalace wajen samun dama ga kyamara. Don Allah ka sake gwadawa.
Speed in pixels/frame required to move t: Saurin da ake buƙata a pixel/frame don motsa sigifa.
Speed of cursor movement in response to: Saurin motsawar sigifa da ya dogara da motsin kai a kwance.
Saurin motsawar sigifa da ya dogara da motsin kai a tsaye.
Switches the left and right mouse button:
Yana sauya maɓallan linzamin hagu da dama.
Yana da amfani idan an riga an sa maɓallan linzamin kwamfuta suyi sauyin wuri a tsarin kwamfutarka.
Hakanan za a iya amfani da shi don yin danna dama tare da danna na tsayawa (dwell) a lokaci na gaggawa.
The previously selected camera is not av: Kyamarar da aka zaɓa a baya ba ta samuwa. Gwada zaɓar "Default" a Video > Camera source, sannan ka zaɓi takamaiman kyamara idan kana buƙata.
Bayanan saituna da za a yi amfani da su.
Toggle Developer Tools (Screen Overlay): Kunna/ kashe kayan aikin masu haɓakawa (Screen Overlay)
Webcam does not support the required res: Kyamarar yanar gizo ba ta goyan bayan ƙudurin da ake buƙata ba. Don Allah ka canza saitunanka.
Webcam is already in use. Please make su: Ana amfani da kyamarar yanar gizo a wani wuri. Ka tabbata babu wani shiri da ke amfani da kyamara sannan ka sake gwadawa.
Zai ci gaba bayan linzamin kwamfuta ya daina motsi.
You can control your entire computer wit: Za ka iya sarrafa dukkan kwamfutarka ta amfani da manhajar tebur ta TrackyMouse.
